title: Mwti's Stone Expansion
description: More variants for each stone type!
body:
![Mwti's Stone Expansion Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QR33NVW7/images/b820ebf47a8dec2bd8eb64640c9f35587f4b638f.png)


#
This mod adds 137* blocks that complete a set of a variant-material relation of stone types that minecraft seems to partially follow.

**not accounting for stairs, slabs & walls!*


**This mod requires Fabric API**

## Stone Expansion compared to Vanilla:

![All blocks arranged in a 2d grid](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/QR33NVW7/images/a10e5ffacc844528fc52d7ca2afa0d4555dc1195.png)

![Vanilla blocks arranged in 2d grid](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/QR33NVW7/images/ded1db0379698dd10b7f78a1c0495bb2e6882591.png)



# Crafting:

Each variant can be crafted through stonecutter using any block that's the same material.
To craft the dark variants, use a black dye in a crafting window along with any block with the same material.
